name: prayoga
description: Mechanistic-interpretability toolkit for refusal in LLMs: extract the refusal direction, run abliteration dose-response (EC50) and the cross-scale EC50 pharmacology law, measure refusal-subspace dimensionality (layer-sweep), the symmetry order parameter, active-inference SAE-feature circuit discovery, the ṣaṭkarma intervention taxonomy, and the real AgentDojo agentic-injection benchmark via claude -p. Backed by real GPU + Tier-1 experiments (no mocks).
